title: LLMRequest
description: Protocol-owned model request family for typed gateway requests that reference artifacts by hash, keep model selection bounded by signed allowlists, and carry explicit MVP limits.

toolAllowlistEntry.description: Schema-validated tool entry that the model may propose but never execute directly.

tool_name.description: Stable tool identifier allowlisted for this request.

arguments_schema_id.description: Schema identifier used to validate proposed tool-call arguments for this tool.

arguments_schema_version.description: Exact schema version used to validate proposed tool-call arguments for this tool.

tool_description.description: Human-facing summary of the allowlisted tool capability exposed to the model.

requestLimits.description: Explicit MVP request and streaming limit profile carried with every model request.

max_request_bytes.description: Maximum serialized LLMRequest payload size in bytes, excluding referenced artifact bytes.

max_tool_calls.description: Maximum number of tool-call proposals that one response may contain.

max_total_tool_call_argument_bytes.description: Maximum combined size in bytes for all proposed tool-call argument payloads in one response.

max_structured_output_bytes.description: Maximum size in bytes for any final structured-output payload or proposal object.

max_streamed_bytes.description: Maximum total streamed response bytes allowed for this request.

max_stream_chunk_bytes.description: Maximum payload size in bytes for one streamed event chunk.

stream_idle_timeout_ms.description: Maximum idle time in milliseconds between streamed events before broker enforcement terminates the stream.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for model request objects.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this model request object.

selection_source.description: Provider and model selection must come from a signed allowlist rather than arbitrary caller input.

provider.description: Provider family selected for this request under the active signed gateway allowlist.

model.description: Provider-specific model identifier selected under the active signed gateway allowlist.

input_artifacts.description: Ordered artifact references that provide all prompt, context, and attachment inputs for the model request. Schema validation rejects exact duplicate entries and runtime validation must also reject repeated artifact digests even when other fields differ.

items.description: Artifact reference supplying one model input by hash instead of embedding raw prompt bytes.

tool_allowlist.description: Explicit per-request allowlist of tool schemas that the model may propose. Schema validation rejects exact duplicate entries and runtime validation must also reject repeated tool identities keyed by tool_name plus argument schema id/version.

items.description: One allowlisted tool definition for this request.

response_mode.description: Expected final response shape. Structured output requires explicit output schema references.

output_schema_id.description: Schema identifier for machine-consumed structured output when response_mode is structured_output.

output_schema_version.description: Exact schema version for machine-consumed structured output when response_mode is structured_output.

streaming_mode.description: Whether the request expects only a final response object or a streamed event sequence plus terminal status.

request_limits.description: Explicit MVP request, proposal, and streaming limits for this model request.
